allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
LORO PIANA PHASE 2: Living Craftsmanship + Hero Image Integration

Major architectural refinements implementing quiet luxury with living motion:

## Component Cleanup (14 files removed)
- Removed all deprecated components with old color classes
- Deleted unused layout components (Header.tsx, Footer.tsx)
- Removed 7 section components (Hero, Manifesto, Testimonials, etc.)
- Cleaned up 4 UI components (Button, Card, ContactForm, ScrollToTop)
- Removed unused lib/utils.ts and LintelCard.tsx
- Eliminated all references to tuscan-terracotta, charcoal, slate-gray colors

## Hero Image Integration
- Added wine country estate image (winecountry.jpg)
- Implemented art-directed composition with object-[center_85%] focal point
- Refined gradient overlay (90% bottom → 35% mid → transparent top)
- Positioned text with viewport-based spacing (pb-36vh/40vh)
- Fixed text overlap with faces through precise positioning

## Phase 2: Living Craftsmanship
- Added ultra-slow 45s parallax background drift with scale(1.02)
- Implemented catalog-style 1.4s fade-in-up animation (24px travel)
- Enhanced Loro gradient (1600px radius, 70% transparency)
- Refined micro-interactions (500ms transitions, 1.01 scale on hover)
- Added Maison palette CSS tokens (--sienna, --clay, --ivory)

## Branding Updates
- Replaced text logos with oneline.png in header and footer
- Added centered shield-nobg.png logo in footer
- Fixed tagline wrapping with whitespace-nowrap
- Reorganized footer layout: logo/date → shield → tagline
- Optimized spacing (mb-6 for consistent rhythm)

## New Pages & Structure
- Created Works, Process, Commissions, Contact pages
- Added SectionTitle component with Loro typography
- Implemented TODO.txt production checklist
- Created CLEANUP_SUMMARY.md documentation
- Added .vercelignore for deployment

## CSS & Animation Refinements
- Updated fade-in-up: 24px travel, cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1)
- Enhanced pan-bg: 45s ease-in-out with scale(1.02)
- Added bg-loro-gradient with expanded radial coverage
- Implemented smooth scroll and reduced motion support

All changes maintain Loro Piana "Proportion. Patina. Permanence." aesthetic with architectural breathing and tactile interactions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Content migration: Scrape 101caststone.com and integrate collections

- Add Puppeteer scraper for Wix site content extraction \(669 images, 38 pages\)
- Create /collections page with 23 products across 4 categories \(mantels, architectural, outdoor, functional\)
- Expand /commissions page from 3 to 6 commission categories with features
- Add Navigation component with desktop dropdown and mobile bottom nav
- Integrate scraped images into public/images/collections/
- Rewrite all product descriptions in brand voice \("Proportion. Patina. Permanence."\)
- Include scraped-content/ with raw data and BRAND-CONTENT.md reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --base main --title "Replace images with edited versions and update assets" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Replaced 32 collection and gallery images with higher-quality edited versions across architectural, functional, mantels, outdoor, and gallery folders
- Updated hero image and logos
- Added `nul` to `.gitignore` to exclude Windows artifact

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify all images render correctly on the site
- [ ] Confirm no broken image links across pages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
